ddls:
CREATE TABLE "foods" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food category */,
  "food_name" TEXT /* Name of the food category */,
  "food_description" TEXT /* Description of the food category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the food category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the food category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymes" (
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enzyme */,
  "enzyme_name" TEXT /* Name of the enzyme */,
  "functional_class" TEXT /* Functional class of the enzyme (e.g., CBM) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enzyme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enzyme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_enzyme_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food category */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "coef" REAL /* Correlation coefficient between the food category and enzyme */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value representing the significance of the correlation */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_enzyme_correlations_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_enzyme_correlations_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymesFunctionalClasses" (
  "functional_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functional class */,
  "functional_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the functional class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the functional class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the functional class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the functional class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("functional_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bins" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bin */,
  "bin_name" TEXT /* Name of the bin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bin was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bin was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_enzyme_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food category */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the pair (e.g., Fruits_CBM12) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymefunctionalClassPairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "functional_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the functional class */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the pair (e.g., CBM12_CBM) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymefunctionalClassPairs_functional_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("functional_class_id") REFERENCES enzymesFunctionalClasses ("functional_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymefunctionalClassPairs_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "binFoodPairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food category */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the pair (e.g., Positive_Fruits) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binFoodPairs_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binFoodPairs_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "binEnzymePairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the pair (e.g., Positive_CBM12) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binEnzymePairs_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binEnzymePairs_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foodEnzymeBinTriples" (
  "triple_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each triple */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food category */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin */,
  "triple_name" TEXT /* Name of the triple (e.g., Fruits_CBM12_Positive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the triple was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the triple was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("triple_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foodEnzymeBinTriples_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foodEnzymeBinTriples_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foodEnzymeBinTriples_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foodBinPairsEnzymes" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food category */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the pair (e.g., Fruits_Positive_CBM12) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foodBinPairsEnzymes_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foodBinPairsEnzymes_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foodBinPairsEnzymes_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymeBinPairsFoods" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food category */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the pair (e.g., CBM12_Positive_Fruits) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymeBinPairsFoods_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymeBinPairsFoods_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymeBinPairsFoods_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymeFoodPairsBins" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food category */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the pair (e.g., CBM12_Fruits_Positive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymeFoodPairsBins_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymeFoodPairsBins_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymeFoodPairsBins_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enzymeFunctionalClassTriples" (
  "triple_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each triple */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme */,
  "functional_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the functional class */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bin */,
  "triple_name" TEXT /* Name of the triple (e.g., CBM12_CBM_Positive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the triple was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the triple was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("triple_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymeFunctionalClassTriples_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymeFunctionalClassTriples_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enzymeFunctionalClassTriples_functional_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("functional_class_id") REFERENCES enzymesFunctionalClasses ("functional_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysisRuns" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysisResults" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis run */,
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correlation */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysisResults_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analysisRuns ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysisResults_correlation_id FOREIGN KEY ("correlation_id") REFERENCES food_enzyme_correlations ("correlation_id")
)
